name: badwulf

metadata.name: badwulf
metadata.summary: Minimal manager for Beowulf clusters and scientific data

documentation:
# Badwulf 

## Minimal manager for Beowulf clusters and scientific data

The goal of *badwulf* is a provide a minimal command line interface for accessing and managing experimental data on scientific computing servers and Beowulf clusters.

This tool is __not__ intended to replace true cluster management and scheduling software for such as *Slurm*. Instead, *badwulf* is a lightweight package for simplying tasks such as:

- Connecting an port forwarded SSH session to a research server behind a login server

- Transfering files and directories between a local client and a research server

- Managing a simple repository of experimental data and metadata

- Searching experimental metadata for terms and keywords

- Syncing experimental data between a local client and a research server

modules.name: badwulf.rssh
documentation: Restricted SSH manager

classes.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.__init__
documentation:
Initialize an rssh instance
\:param username: Your username on destination machine
\:param destination: The destination machine hostname
\:param server: The gateway server hostname (optional)
\:param server_username: Your username on the gateway server (optional)
\:param port: The local port for gateway server SSH forwarding
\:param destination_port: The destination port
\:param autoconnect: Connect on initialization?

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.__str__
documentation: Return str(self)

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.__repr__
documentation: Return repr(self)

documentation: Enter context manager

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.__exit__
documentation: Exit context manager

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.__del__
documentation: Delete self

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.hostname
documentation: Get the hostname used for the SSH connection

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.isopen
documentation: Check if the gateway server connection is open

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.open
documentation: Open the connection to the gateway server

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.ls
documentation:
List files on the destination machine
\:param file: A file or directory or list of them
\:param all_names: Should hidden files be included?
\:param details: Show file metadata details?

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.copy_id
documentation:
Copy local SSH keys to the destination machine
\:param id_file: The identity file (ending in .pub)
\:param ask: Confirm before copying?

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.download
documentation:
Download file(s) to local storage using rsync
\:param src: The source path on the destination machine
\:param dest: The destination path on the local machine
\:param dry_run: Show what would be done without doing it?
\:param ask: Confirm before downloading?

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.upload
documentation:
Upload file(s) from local storage using rsync
\:param src: The source path on the local machine
\:param dest: The destination path on the destination machine
\:param dry_run: Show what would be done without doing it?
\:param ask: Confirm before uploading?

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.ssh
documentation: Attach an unrestricted ssh terminal session

methods.name: badwulf.rssh.rssh.close
documentation: Close the connection to the gateway server
Restricted SSH manager for rsync

classes.name: badwulf.cli.clmanager.clmanager

methods.name: badwulf.cli.clmanager.clmanager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a cluster CLI utility program
\:param name: The name of the cluster/server
\:param nodes: A list of nodenames or dict in the form {alias: nodename}
\:param version: The version of the program
\:param date: The date of the program's last revision
\:param description: A description of the program
\:param readme: The file path of a README.md file
\:param program: The name of the program (defaults to name)
\:param username: Your username on the cluster
\:param server: The gateway server hostname (optional)
\:param server_username: Your username on the gateway server (optional)
\:param port: The local port for gateway server SSH forwarding

methods.name: badwulf.cli.clmanager.clmanager._add_cluster_args
documentation:
Add cluster parameters to a parser.
\:param parser: The parser to update

documentation:
Check if the program is running on a cluster node
:returns: True if running the a cluster node, False otherwise

methods.name: badwulf.cli.clmanager.clmanager.resolve_node
documentation:
Get single valid nodename from a list of nodes
\:param nodes: A list of nodenames

methods.name: badwulf.cli.clmanager.clmanager.open_ssh
documentation:
Open SSH connection to a cluster node
\:param node: The target cluster node
\:param username: Your username on the cluster
\:param server: The gateway server hostname (optional)
\:param server_username: Your username on the gateway server (optional)
\:param port: Port used for gateway forwarding
\:returns: An open rssh instance

functions.name: badwulf.tools.to_bytes
documentation:
Convert a size to bytes
\:param x: A positive number
\:param units: The units for x (KB, MB, GB, etc.)
\:returns: The number of bytes

documentation:
Format bytes

\:param units: The units (B, KB, MB, etc.)
\:returns: A string

functions.name: badwulf.tools.print_bytes
documentation:
Print bytes

\:param units: The units (B, KB, MB, etc.)

functions.name: badwulf.tools.format_datasets
documentation:
Format datasets
\:param iterable: An iterable of datasets
\:param names_only: Print names only?
\:param header: Print number of datasets?
\:return: A formatted string

functions.name: badwulf.tools.print_datasets
documentation:
Print datasets
\:param iterable: An iterable of datasets
\:param names_only: Print names only?
\:param header: Print number of datasets?

functions.name: badwulf.tools.askYesNo
documentation:
Ask a user to confirm yes or no
\:param msg: The message to print
\:returns: True if yes, False if no

functions.name: badwulf.tools.fix_path
documentation:
Normalize and expand paths
\:param path: The path to normalize
\:param must_exist: Must the path exist?
\:returns: The normalized path

functions.name: badwulf.tools.file_create
documentation:
Create a file
\:param path: The file to create

functions.name: badwulf.tools.file_remove
documentation:
Delete a file
\:param path: The file to delete

functions.name: badwulf.tools.ls
documentation:
List files in a directory
\:param path: The directory
\:param all_names: Should hidden files be included?
\:returns: A list of file names

functions.name: badwulf.tools.dirsize
documentation:
Get size of a directory
\:param path: The directory
\:param all_names: Should hidden files be included?
\:returns: The size of the directory in bytes

functions.name: badwulf.tools.checkport
documentation:
Check if a port is open (i.e., if it is in use)
\:param port: The port to check
\:returns: 0 if open, an error code otherwise

functions.name: badwulf.tools.findport
documentation:
Find an available port (for SSH forwarding)
\:param attempts: How many random ports to attempt
\:returns: The port number

functions.name: badwulf.tools.grep1
documentation:
Search for a pattern in a string
\:param pattern: The pattern to find
\:param x: A string
\:param ignore_case: Should case be ignored?
\:param context_width: Width of a context window to return
\:returns: A Match or None

functions.name: badwulf.tools.grep
documentation:
Search for a pattern in an iterable
\:param pattern: The pattern to find
\:param x: An iterable
\:param ignore_case: Should case be ignored?
\:returns: A list of matches

functions.name: badwulf.tools.grepl
documentation:
Search for a pattern in an iterable
\:param pattern: The pattern to find
\:param x: An iterable
\:param ignore_case: Should case be ignored?
\:returns: A list of bools

Get list of cached group metadata

Get list of cached scope metadata

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.ls
documentation:
List all datasets by name
\:param scope: Filter by scope
\:param group: Filter by group
\:param details: Return names only or dataset details?
\:returns: A list of datasets

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.ls_cache
documentation:
List cached datasets by name
\:param scope: Filter by scope
\:param group: Filter by group
\:param details: Return names only or dataset details?
\:returns: A list of datasets

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.search
documentation:
Search all dataset metadata for a pattern
\:param pattern: The pattern to find
\:param scope: Filter by scope
\:param group: Filter by group
\:returns: A list of search hits

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.search_cache
documentation:
Search cached dataset metadata for a pattern
\:param pattern: The pattern to find
\:param scope: Filter by scope
\:param group: Filter by group
\:returns: A list of search hits

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.prune_cache
documentation:
List cached datasets by name
\:param limit: Maximum size of the cache
\:param units: Size units (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, etc.)
\:param strategy: One of "lru", "mru", "big", "small"
\:param dry_run: Show what would be done without doing it?
\:param ask: Confirm before deleting?

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.sync
documentation:
Sync a dataset to local storage
\:param name: The name of the dataset
\:param force: Should the dataset be re-synced if already cached?
\:param dry_run: Show what would be done without doing it?
\:param ask: Confirm before downloading?

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.submit
documentation:
Submit a dataset to the database maintainer(s)
\:param path: The path to the data directory
\:param force: Should the dataset be re-submitted if already tracked?
\:param dry_run: Show what would be done without doing it?
\:param ask: Confirm before uploading?

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.status
documentation:
Get status of cache versus manifest
\:param scope: Filter by scope
\:param group: Filter by group
\:param details: Return names only or dataset details?
\:returns: A tuple like (synced, remoteonly, localonly)

methods.name: badwulf.expdb.expdb.close
documentation: Remove the connection to the database
Database manager for experimental datasets and metadata
